{"uid": "222222222222222222222222", "status": "read", "watcherUid": "22222222222222222222222222222222", "watcherGroupUid": "22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222", "foundTime": 1737681976547, "post": {"lastUpdated": 1737660878645, "links": {"forum": {"uid": "66666666666666666666666666666666", "name": "xss.is", "description": "XSS is a successor to the DaMaGeLaB, one of the oldest cybercrime forums in Russian-speaking underground. DaMaGeLaB was founded in 2004 and existed until late 2017, when forum's administrator Ar3s (Belarusian national Sergey Yarets) was arrested. XSS was launched in the late 2018, and was based on DaMaGeLaB's database backup. Today XSS is primarily a Russian and English-language underground forum catering for all breeds of financially motivated cyber threat actors. Registration is required to view the forum's content; XSS also has restricted sections, accessible by trusted members only. In Feb. 2021 it had a user base of about 34,000 members. The registration of new members is open, but requires passing a simple challenge. Additionally, the forum provides its members with an escrow service and a money deposit systems. The forum is well curated by a team of moderators and is administered by the actor Toxa, formerly an administrator of the Exploit cybercrime forum."}, "thread": {"uid": "77777777777777777777777777777777", "topic": "Cisco Data Breach", "count": 5}, "authorActor": {"uid": "abc123", "handle": "dummyuser07"}}, "date": 1737650632000, "uid": "88888888888888888888888888888888", "message": "
